G := sub<Sym(126)|(1, 13)(2, 121)(3, 15)(4, 97)(5, 27)(6, 116)(7, 81)(8, 71)(9, 61)(10, 26)(11, 115)(12, 45)(14, 21)(16, 91)(17, 66)(18, 94)(19, 105)(20, 75)(22, 49)(23, 82)(24, 50)(25, 64)(28, 31)(29, 43)(30, 103)(32, 68)(33,65)(34, 102)(35, 95)(36, 56)(37, 123)(38, 44)(39, 112)(40, 108)(41, 79)(42, 85)(46, 88)(47, 107)(48, 124)(51, 126)(52, 73)(53, 62)(54, 96)(55, 84)(57, 100)(58, 87)(59, 70)(60, 119)(63, 101)(67, 122)(69, 90)(72, 83)(74, 110)(76, 125)(77, 109)(78, 117)(80, 89)(86, 106)(92, 118)(93, 120)(98, 104)(99, 113)(111, 114),(1, 115)(2, 13)(3, 68)(4, 17)(5, 31)(6, 80)(7, 38)(8, 70)(9, 76)(10, 55)(11,46)(12, 32)(14, 18)(15, 111)(16, 21)(19, 22)(20, 69)(23, 57)(24, 126)(25, 99)(26, 65)(27, 63)(28, 121)(29, 96)(30, 52)(33, 122)(34, 112)(35, 97)(36, 85)(37, 102)(39, 64)(40, 79)(41, 66)(42, 78)(43, 113)(44, 117)(45, 47)(48, 82)(49, 56)(50, 95)(51, 108)(53, 75)(54, 123)(58, 60)(59, 94)(61, 114)(62, 118)(67, 98)(71, 119)(72, 109)(73, 93)(74, 100)(77, 110)(81, 105)(83, 86)(84, 89)(87, 91)(88, 101)(90, 120)(92, 103)(104, 116)(106, 124)(107, 125),(1, 47)(2, 90)(3, 84)(4, 16)(5, 23)(6, 85)(7, 69)(8, 121)(9, 42)(10, 24)(11,117)(12, 58)(13, 72)(14, 103)(15, 40)(17, 50)(18, 86)(19, 44)(20, 124)(21, 75)(22, 96)(25, 109)(26, 87)(27, 66)(28, 111)(29, 126)(30, 59)(31, 74)(32, 119)(33, 98)(34, 76)(35, 49)(36, 54)(37, 89)(38, 110)(39, 61)(41, 99)(43, 55)(45, 82)(46, 113)(48, 68)(51, 64)(52, 116)(53, 100)(56, 101)(57, 95)(60, 70)(62, 63)(65, 67)(71, 79)(73, 92)(77, 108)(78, 83)(80, 91)(81, 88)(93, 112)(94, 105)(97, 104)(102, 107)(106, 114)(115, 125)(118, 120)(122, 123)>;

[
    G!(1, 74)(2, 86)(3, 62)(4, 27)(5, 93)(6, 107)(7, 15)(8, 9)(10, 29)(11,

        87)(11, 82)(12, 123)(13, 33)(15, 75)(16, 20)(18, 29)(19, 61)(22, 41)(23,
        97)(24, 67)(25, 70)(26, 101)(27, 30)(28, 59)(31, 78)(32, 38)(34, 96)(35,
        108)(36, 109)(37, 63)(39, 40)(42, 79)(43, 118)(44, 84)(45, 89)(46, 
        56)(47, 121)(48, 110)(49, 54)(50, 64)(51, 68)(52, 86)(53, 71)(55, 
        99)(58, 92)(60, 100)(65, 102)(66, 113)(73, 91)(74, 119)(76, 93)(77,

    G!(1, 51)(2, 114)(3, 91)(4, 7)(5, 73)(6, 112)(8, 38)(9, 19)(10, 64)(11, 
        21)(12, 99)(13, 93)(14, 69)(15, 78)(16, 87)(17, 63)(18, 57)(20, 92)(22, 
        118)(23, 26)(24, 44)(25, 83)(27, 65)(28, 42)(29, 105)(30, 35)(31, 
        79)(32, 98)(33, 90)(34, 104)(36, 88)(37, 54)(39, 62)(40, 115)(41, 
        116)(43, 55)(45, 72)(46, 95)(47, 81)(48, 49)(50, 97)(52, 122)(53, 
        86)(56, 71)(58, 124)(59, 106)(60, 89)(61, 110)(66, 123)(67, 96)(68, 
        120)(70, 103)(74, 76)(75, 109)(77, 125)(80, 82)(84, 111)(85, 100)(94, 
        117)(101, 113)(102, 119)(107, 108)(121, 126)
]

];

geometries := [* *];


for i in [1..#involutions] do
	G1 := sub<G|involutions[i][2],involutions[i][3]>;
	G2 := sub<G|involutions[i][1],involutions[i][3]>;
	G3 := sub<G|involutions[i][1],involutions[i][2]>;
	Append(~geometries,CosetGeometry(G,{G1,G2,G3}));
end for;
